subcodes.first_line: O My trusted one! In thy letters thou didst make mention of the gathering of God's loved ones, and some [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین من در نامه های خویش ذکر جمع احباء الله را نموده بودید و بعضی را
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @past, present and future of Iran, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
